requirement_topic.en: Network Interoperability, OCPP Readiness, and EMC
requirement_topic.zh: 联网互操作、OCPP准备及电磁兼容
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網互操作、OCPP準備及電磁相容

summary.en: Networked chargers in El Salvador should be prepared for operator-specified OCPP back-office integration, remote monitoring, tariff or payment interface requirements, cybersecurity settings, and fault reporting. EMC and power-quality evidence should be organized against IEC 61000-family expectations and any OSARTEC / OSN adopted standard or project requirement. If the site connects to a fleet, shopping-center, workplace, or public network, OCPP version, SIM or Ethernet communication, metering, and data-retention requirements should be confirmed before shipment.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多联网充电桩应准备满足运营商指定的OCPP后台集成、远程监控、电价或支付接口要求、网络安全设置和故障报告。电磁兼容和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列预期以及任何OSARTEC / OSN采标标准或项目要求整理。如场站接入车队、购物中心、工作场所或公共网络，应在出货前确认OCPP版本、SIM卡或以太网通信、计量和数据留存要求。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多聯網充電樁應準備滿足運營商指定的OCPP後台集成、遠程監控、電價或支付接口要求、網絡安全設置和故障報告。電磁相容和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列預期以及任何OSARTEC / OSN採標標準或項目要求整理。如場站接入車隊、購物中心、工作場所或公共網絡，應在出貨前確認OCPP版本、SIM卡或以太網通訊、計量和數據留存要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
OCPP — operator-specified back-office communication for networked chargers
SIGET electricity and telecommunications regulatory context where communications services are involved

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930 communication between the off-board charger and the vehicle BMS, while back-office protocols may be operator-specific. GB/T 27930 is a vehicle-charger DC protocol and is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration or IEC 61000 EMC evidence.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930作为非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间的通信协议，后台协议则可能随运营商而异。GB/T 27930是车桩直流通信协议，不能替代OCPP后台集成或IEC 61000电磁兼容证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930作為非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間的通訊協議，後台協議則可能隨運營商而異。GB/T 27930是車樁直流通訊協議，不能替代OCPP後台集成或IEC 61000電磁相容證據。

standards_or_laws: China EMC test reports where available

gap.en: Confirm the OCPP version and central-system endpoint, charger identity and certificate handling, network carrier, payment interface, meter data format, firmware-update process, and fault-notification requirements. Separately, prepare EMC and harmonic evidence against IEC 61000-family expectations. A charger that only documents GB/T 27930 DC communication is not network-ready for a Salvadoran public or fleet charging deployment.
gap.zh: 应确认OCPP版本和中央系统端点、充电桩身份及证书处理、网络运营商、支付接口、计量数据格式、固件升级流程和故障通知要求。同时，应按IEC 61000系列预期准备电磁兼容和谐波证据。仅提供GB/T 27930直流通信文件的充电桩，并不具备萨尔瓦多公共或车队充电部署的联网准备状态。
gap.zht: 應確認OCPP版本和中央系統端點、充電樁身份及證書處理、網絡運營商、支付接口、計量數據格式、韌體升級流程和故障通知要求。同時，應按IEC 61000系列預期準備電磁相容和諧波證據。僅提供GB/T 27930直流通訊文件的充電樁，並不具備薩爾瓦多公共或車隊充電部署的聯網準備狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — mandatory where required by the charge-point operator, public-network operator, fleet owner, site owner, tender, or distributor power-quality review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China DC vehicle-charger protocol and does not substitute for OCPP or IEC 61000 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat OCPP integration and EMC evidence as separate workstreams. GB/T 27930 is not a back-office protocol, and China EMC reports should be mapped to IEC 61000 and the Salvadoran project specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将OCPP集成和电磁兼容证据作为两条独立工作线处理。GB/T 27930不是后台协议，中国EMC报告应映射至IEC 61000及萨尔瓦多项目规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將OCPP集成和電磁相容證據作為兩條獨立工作線處理。GB/T 27930不是後台協議，中國EMC報告應映射至IEC 61000及薩爾瓦多項目規範。
